ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "middate_time" TEXT /* Middate and time of the poll */,
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the pollster that conducted the poll */,
  "clinton" REAL /* Percentage of votes for Clinton */,
  "trump" REAL /* Percentage of votes for Trump */,
  "margin" TEXT /* Margin between Clinton and Trump */,
  "start_end" TEXT /* Start and end dates of the poll */,
  "released_entered" TEXT /* Released and entered dates of the poll */,
  "poll_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the poll (e.g., national, state) */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Number of respondents in the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll */,
  "weighting_method" TEXT /* Method used to weight the poll results */,
  "poll_status" TEXT /* Status of the poll (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "poll_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the poll */,
  "poll_url" TEXT /* URL to the original source of the poll data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_poll_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_type_id") REFERENCES poll_types ("poll_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster_id FOREIGN KEY ("pollster_id") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollster */,
  "polling_method" TEXT /* Method used by the pollster (e.g., online, phone) */,
  "pollster_website" TEXT /* Website of the pollster */,
  "pollster_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the pollster */,
  "pollster_reputation_score" REAL /* Reputation score of the pollster */,
  "pollster_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the pollster was founded */,
  "pollster_location" TEXT /* Location of the pollster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_types" (
  "poll_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll type */,
  "poll_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the poll type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll that this question belongs to */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "answer_choices" TEXT /* Possible answer choices for the question */,
  "question_status" TEXT /* Status of the question (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "question_order" INTEGER /* Order of the question in the poll */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_questions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question that this response belongs to */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of respondents who chose this answer */,
  "response_order" INTEGER /* Order of the response */,
  "response_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of respondents who chose this answer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES poll_questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., journalist, analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "user_created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll that this tag belongs to */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_tags_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison */,
  "poll_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first poll being compared */,
  "poll_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second poll being compared */,
  "comparison_text" TEXT /* Text describing the comparison */,
  "comparison_status" TEXT /* Status of the comparison (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date the comparison was made */,
  "comparison_methodology" TEXT /* Detailed description of the comparison methodology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comparisons_poll_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id2") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comparisons_poll_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id1") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll that this comment belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was posted */,
  "comment_status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "comment_edit_date" TEXT /* Last edit date of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll that this rating belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was posted */,
  "rating_status" TEXT /* Status of the rating (e.g., active, deleted) */,
  "rating_edit_date" TEXT /* Last edit date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_ratings_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
